# CWE-1327 positive: binds all interfaces (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1327-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1327: Binding to an Unrestricted IP Address.
// Vulnerable: ListenAndServe on :9090 binds 0.0.0.0 and exposes the service network-wide.

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func StartPublicAPIPure(db *sql.DB) error {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	mux.HandleFunc("/status", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		if db == nil || db.Ping() != nil {
			http.Error(w, "db down", http.StatusServiceUnavailable)
			return
		}
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	})
	return http.ListenAndServe(":9090", mux)
}
